question: Paris is the capital of Germany and is located in France. Verify this statement.

Facebook was created by Mark Zuckerberg and launched in 2010. Check the details.
Tesla was founded by Elon Musk in 2003 and produces electric cars. Verify all parts.
Jordan is a country and also a famous basketball player. Explain and verify both meanings.

Amazon is a company and also a river in Europe. Analyze this statement.
Mercury is a planet and also a chemical element used in thermometers. Verify both.
Jaguar is a car brand and also a species of bird. Check this statement.
Albert Einstein is the capital of Germany and a physicist. Verify this statement.
The Nile River is a country located in Africa. Check this claim.
Berlin is a person who founded Germany. Analyze this statement.
Python is a programming language and also a capital city. Verify both parts.
